html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be unwrapped to release items inside.”

-

The Crumpled Package is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It can be obtained by fishing in the Lake at the Oasis. Similar to Bundled Supplies, Crumpled Packages contain items, that will be dropped when opened.

Most packages contain Trinkets, thus making them renewable. Some special Trinkets, like the Beach Toy and the Red Crown, can only be acquired by finding it inside a Crumpled Package. However, it may also contain the rare Blueprint for the Desert Goggles, as well as various other Blueprints. The chance for a player of getting the rare blueprints decreases after they have been learnt.

Item Chance (Before learned) Chance (After learned)
13% 13%
13% 13%
13% 13%
13% 13%
1.3% 1.3%
6.5% 6.5%
13% 13%
() 26% 1.3%
1.3% 26%

Tips

  • During Winter's Feast event, the 4 common trinkets each have a 50% chance to be replaced by Festive Baubles (plain or fancy), or Festive Lights.
  • Its possible to save the game before opening Crumpled Packages, and if none of the items dropped are desired, one can rollback the save to before the Crumpled Packages were opened and try again.
    • It must be noted that the player must load a rollback from the server menu rather than the in-game options, or else repeatedly loading a rollback can cause the game to always load the previous one.
    • Its recommended to learn the Desert Goggles crafting recipe before doing this, to increase the drop rate of standard Blueprints

Trivia

  • Crumpled Packages were introduced in the Against the Grain update.

Assets

  • unwrap

The '''Crumpled Package''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It can be obtained by [[Fishing Rod|fishing]] in the [[Lake]] at the [[Set Piece#Oasis|Oasis]]. Similar to [[Bundled Supplies]], Crumpled Packages contain items, that will be dropped when opened.

Most packages contain [[Trinkets]], thus making them renewable. Some special Trinkets, like the [[Trinkets#Beach Toy|Beach Toy]] and the [[Red Crown]], can only be acquired by finding it inside a Crumpled Package. However, it may also contain the rare [[Blueprint]] for the [[Desert Goggles]], as well as various other Blueprints. The chance for a player of getting the rare blueprints decreases after they have been learnt.

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* During [[Winter's Feast]] event, the 4 common trinkets each have a 50% chance to be replaced by [[Festive Baubles]] (plain or fancy), or [[Festive Lights|Festive Lights.]]
*Its possible to save the game ''before'' opening Crumpled Packages, and if none of the items dropped are desired, one can rollback the save to before the Crumpled Packages were opened and try again. 
**It must be noted that the player must load a rollback from the server menu rather than the in-game options, or else repeatedly loading a rollback can cause the game to always load the previous one.
**Its recommended to learn the Desert Goggles crafting recipe before doing this, to increase the drop rate of standard Blueprints

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Crumpled Packages were introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#February 2nd, 2017 - Against the Grain|Against the Grain]]'' update.
